positive: A vibrant, stylized circular emblem featuring a majestic, stylized cosmic moth with iridescent wings, set against a deep indigo and nebula background. The moth is centered, rendered with strong, elegant silhouettes and glowing particle effects. Scattered around the moth are geometric celestial elements like crescent moons, stylized constellations, and minimalist planetary rings, all drawn in a clean, modern linework style. The color palette should be highly contrasting: deep purples, electric blues, cosmic magentas, and metallic gold accents. Ideal for a chest print on apparel, emphasizing strong contrast and clean edges. Graphic design, vector illustration aesthetic, high detail, smooth gradients, cinematic lighting.
negative: lowres, blurry, amateur, watermark, text, signature, logo, copyright, messy, noisy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, artifacts, bokeh, grayscale, muddy colors
